name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N |-> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
     /\ forks' = forks
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
     /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
     /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
     /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
     /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF Len(q) = K - 1 THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = IF Len(q) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
